channel.title: Can someone guide me like how to make a static website using frontity and wordpress
channel.description:
I am very new to Frontity and Wordpress! i have done the setup for both, and connected each other! Can somebody guide me further like how to move forward with the making of static website ? I know react and all the basic stuff
Discord : Hawk#2354 email : anmol.world321@gmail.com
